article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures. His production style is characterized by a fusion of electronic and dancehall elements.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is defined by a distinctive blend of electronic and dancehall influences, which has earned him a notable presence within the Latin electronic scene.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, a collection that includes his signature samples, loops, and drum patterns used across various projects.

His work is further contextualized by associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
